circuits.designation: Lighting L1 — open office LED panels

selectivity_results.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60947-2:2017 — Upstream 100A Type D MCCB at MSB-MAIN F02 selective against SDB-L1 100A switch-disconnector (non-OCPD pass-through device) at local 4.5 kA PFC; cascade is bounded by the downstream final-circuit MCBs.

BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60898-1:2019 — 100A upstream MCCB (at MSB-MAIN F02) cascaded against final-circuit MCBs (≤32A); worst-case ratio 100:32 ≈ 3.1:1 sits comfortably above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold at the local 4.5 kA PFC; 10 kA Icn on the MCBs exceeds the local PFC.

non_compliance_flags.message: Neutral current 30.9 A is 43.1% of the largest phase (L1 = 71.7 A). Per IET OSG Appendix A: single-phase load distribution best practice — rebalance recommended. Re-allocate one or more circuits between phases to reduce neutral loading and improve voltage symmetry.
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: IEC 60364-5-52:2009 § 524.2.2 + IET OSG Appendix A (load balancing best practice)

assumptions: BS EN 61439-3 Distribution Board (DBO) used for the sub-DB.
BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 411.3.3: 30mA Type A RCD applied to all socket-bearing circuits (C04-C09, C11, C12).
Emergency lighting C03 supplied on dedicated circuit per BS 7671 §560 — no RCD upstream to preserve life-safety availability.
HVAC FCU C10 is a fixed motor circuit (no socket): Type C curve handles inrush; no RCD required (Reg 411.3.3 socket exemption).
Estimated PFC at SDB-L1 ≈ 4.5 kA after 30m 35mm² SWA feeder impedance from 9.8kA at MSB-MAIN.

drawing_notes: SDB-L1 located in level-1 electrical cupboard.
Fed from MSB-MAIN F02 via 30m 35mm² 5-core SWA XLPE Cu feeder.

rationale.chat_summary: SDB-L1: 100A TPN+E level-1 sub-DB for a UK 3-storey office, 12 final circuits (lighting + emergency + socket RFCs + HVAC FCU + dedicated A/V + comms UPS), fed from MSB-MAIN F02 via 30m 35mm² SWA. BS EN 61439-3 DBO IP4X enclosure. 30mA Type A RCD on all socket circuits per BS 7671 § 411.3.3; emergency lighting and HVAC FCU intentionally excluded. Cascade selectivity to F02 verified at 3.1:1 worst-case at the local 4.5 kA PFC.

sections.title: Board Identification
sections.summary: SDB-L1 is the level-1 sub-DB for the UK 3-storey office, located in the level-1 electrical cupboard directly above SDB-GF in the riser. Built as a BS EN 61439-3 Distribution Board (DBO) — the UK default for sub-DB construction — with IP4X rating for the indoor cupboard environment. Role flagged as `floor_distribution` so downstream consumers (riser, cable-containment, earthing) recognise the per-floor cascade topology; topology mirrors SDB-GF and SDB-L2 to simplify floor-fit-out and spares-management.

decisions.label: Board role flagged as floor_distribution
decisions.summary: Signals per-floor distribution function to downstream skills (riser, cable-containment, earthing); part of the MSB-MAIN → SDB-GF/L1/L2 cascade.

decisions.label: BS EN 61439-3 DBO enclosure, IP4X
decisions.summary: DBO-class assembly per BS EN 61439-3 is the UK sub-DB default; IP4X protects against solid objects ≥1 mm in the indoor cupboard environment.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 100A TPN+E intake at 400V fed from MSB-MAIN F02 via a 30m 35mm² 5-core SWA XLPE Cu feeder (twice the length of the F01 feeder to SDB-GF). Declared PFC at SDB-L1 is 4.5 kA — attenuated from 9.8 kA at MSB-MAIN by the longer feeder impedance; covered by the 10 kA Icn on all final-circuit MCBs. Main switch is a 100A switch-disconnector (non-OCPD isolation device) at 10 kA Icw; overcurrent protection lives upstream on the F02 MCCB at MSB-MAIN.

decisions.label: 100A TPN+E intake from MSB-MAIN F02 (30m feeder)
decisions.summary: Floor maximum demand ~26 kVA after BS 7671 § 311.1 + IET OSG Appendix A diversity sits within the 100A intake; matches the F02 feeder rating.
decisions.rule: Sub-DB sizing from floor maximum demand + diversity
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 + IET On-Site Guide Appendix A

decisions.label: Declared PFC 4.5 kA at SDB-L1 after feeder impedance
decisions.summary: Attenuation from 9.8 kA at MSB-MAIN via 30m 35mm² Cu SWA impedance — roughly half the GF value because feeder loop impedance scales linearly with length; covered by 10 kA Icn final-circuit MCBs with ~120% headroom.

decisions.label: 100A switch-disconnector as main switch
decisions.summary: Sub-DB main switch is a non-OCPD switch-disconnector — overcurrent protection lives upstream on the MSB-MAIN F02 MCCB; switch-disconnector provides on-load isolation only per UK sub-DB convention.

sections.title: Circuit Breakdown
sections.summary: 12 final circuits: C01/C02 lighting (Type B MCBs, no RCD), C03 emergency lighting (Type B, no RCD), C04-C07 socket RFCs/radials (32A/32A/32A/20A Type B + 30mA Type A RCD), C08 dedicated A/V-rack socket 16A (Type B + 30mA), C09 dedicated comms-cabinet UPS socket 16A (Type B + 30mA), C10 HVAC FCU 32A (Type C, no RCD — fixed-motor exempt from § 411.3.3), C11 IT/data ring 32A (Type B + 30mA), C12 A/V radial 20A (Type B + 30mA). Level-1 mix shifts vs SDB-GF: kitchen radial (GF C07) replaced by dedicated comms-UPS socket — reflects level-1 use as the office IT/meeting hub.

decisions.label: 30mA Type A RCD on all socket-bearing circuits
decisions.summary: BS 7671 § 411.3.3 + § 415.1 universal socket-RCD policy on C04-C09, C11, C12; Type A handles pulsating-DC residual from modern switching supplies.

decisions.label: Emergency lighting C03 — no upstream RCD
decisions.summary: BS 7671 § 560 + BS 5266-1 require life-safety circuit availability — RCD upstream would create a single point of failure for the emergency-lighting circuit.

decisions.label: HVAC FCU C10 — Type C, no RCD
decisions.summary: Fixed motor circuit (no socket) — outside the § 411.3.3 socket-RCD scope; Type C curve handles motor inrush without nuisance trip on the 32A MCB.
decisions.rule: Fixed-motor circuit MCB curve + RCD exemption

sections.title: Selectivity Analysis
sections.summary: Two-stage cascade: 100A Type D MCCB at MSB-MAIN F02, then non-OCPD 100A switch-disconnector at SDB-L1, then final MCBs (6-32A Type B/C). Worst-case feeder-MCCB-to-final-MCB ratio is 100:32 ≈ 3.1:1, above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold. The Type D upstream curve trips slower than Type B/C final MCBs at every fault magnitude up to the 4.5 kA local PFC, so the downstream MCB clears before the MCCB operates. 10 kA Icn on all final MCBs exceeds the 4.5 kA local PFC by 120%. Engineer-declared verdict is firm at this PFC margin.

decisions.label: Cascade ratio 3.1:1 worst-case at C10 (32A)
decisions.summary: 100A:32A feeder-MCCB-to-final-MCB ratio sits above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold; analysis identical to SDB-GF and SDB-L2 because the upstream feeder OCPDs are uniform.

decisions.label: Type D upstream + Type B/C downstream — curve separation aids selectivity
decisions.summary: Type D MCCB at F02 has a 10-20× In magnetic trip threshold; Type B downstream MCBs trip at 3-5× In — downstream MCB always operates first for faults below the upstream magnetic threshold.

sections.title: Compliance Assessment
sections.summary: SDB-L1 compliant against BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 (protection § 411 / § 415 / § 434 / § 536, emergency-lighting § 560, cable-sizing Appendix 4, voltage-drop Appendix 12), BS EN 61439-3:2012 (DBO assembly construction), BS EN 60898-1:2019 (final-circuit MCBs), and BS EN 61009-1:2012+A12:2014 where socket-circuit RCBOs are used. No CRITICAL or HIGH flags. The 30m feeder is mid-cascade — voltage drop sits ≈ 0.83% / 3.30V on 400V line-line at 100A, within Appendix 12 limits with headroom.

decisions.label: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 + BS EN 61439-3 citation discipline
decisions.summary: Protection clauses cite BS 7671 directly (UK source jurisdiction); enclosure construction cites BS EN 61439-3 as the DBO assembly standard.

decisions.label: DBO enclosure construction
decisions.summary: Distribution Board built and verified per BS EN 61439-3:2012 — UK sub-DB default for the DBO class.

sections.title: Schedule Notes
sections.summary: Schedule emitted as 12-row table with 4 spare ways (W13-W16) reserved for floor expansion (additional desk-bank, future video-conferencing AV upgrade, comms-room dual-feed). Level-1 differs from SDB-GF in load mix: dedicated comms-UPS socket (C09) reflects level-1 IT-hub function; otherwise topology is uniform across floors to simplify spares and floor-fit-out. Voltage drop on the 30m feeder is mid-cascade and well within BS 7671 Appendix 12 limits at the rated 100A.

decisions.label: 4 spare ways reserved (W13-W16)
decisions.summary: Floor-expansion provision: additional desk-bank socket RFC, future video-conferencing AV upgrade, or dual-feed for comms cabinet.

decisions.label: Uniform floor topology across SDB-GF/L1/L2
decisions.summary: 12-way + 4-spare layout is uniform across the three floor sub-DBs to simplify spares management, floor-fit-out, and future floor-by-floor refurbishment.

decisions.label: main_switch.breaking_capacity_ka carries Icw not Icu
decisions.summary: BS EN 60947-3 switch-disconnectors do not break fault current; the breaking_capacity_ka IR field carries the device's short-time withstand (Icw) rating. Equipment manufacturer's catalogue confirms 10 kA Icw / 1 s.
decisions.rule: BS EN 60947-3 switch-disconnector IR field semantics
